name: @valoir/rizz-workspace
description: rizz — the lightest, most connectable coding agent harness. Single-agent minimal by default; /workspace multi-agent on demand.

scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm eval && pnpm footprint
scripts.pack:public: pnpm build && rm -rf dist-pack && mkdir -p dist-pack && pnpm --filter @valoir/rizz-brain pack --pack-destination ./dist-pack && pnpm --filter @valoir/rizz-providers pack --pack-destination ./dist-pack && pnpm --filter @valoir/rizz-core pack --pack-destination ./dist-pack && pnpm --filter @valoir/rizz-tui pack --pack-destination ./dist-pack && pnpm --filter @valoir/rizz pack --pack-destination ./dist-pack
